passage_title: An inquiry into the existence of the gifted child

sentences.sentence: Let us start by looking at a modern "genius", Maryam Mirzakhani, who died at the early age of 40.
sentences.translation: 让我们先看看现代的一位“天才”玛丽安·米尔扎哈尼，她年仅40岁便去世了。

structure.text: Let us start by looking at a modern "genius", Maryam Mirzakhani
who died at the early age of 40

difficult_points: Let us 是祈使结构，表示‘让我们……’。
who 引导的定语从句补充说明 Maryam Mirzakhani。

sentences.sentence: She was the only woman to win the Fields Medal - the mathematical equivalent of a Nobel prize.
sentences.translation: 她是唯一一位获得菲尔兹奖的女性——这项奖被视为数学界的诺贝尔奖。

structure.text: the only woman to win the Fields Medal
the mathematical equivalent of a Nobel prize

difficult_points: to win 修饰 the only woman，表示她是唯一获奖女性。
破折号后的名词短语是 Fields Medal 的同位语。

sentences.sentence: It would be easy to assume that someone as special as Mirzakhani must have been one of those "gifted" children, those who have an extraordinary ability in a specific sphere of activity or knowledge.
sentences.translation: 人们很容易以为，像米尔扎哈尼这样特别的人一定是“天才儿童”中的一员，也就是在某一活动或知识领域具有非凡能力的孩子。

structure.text: to assume that someone as special as Mirzakhani must have been one of those "gifted" children
those who have an extraordinary ability in a specific sphere of activity or knowledge
who have an extraordinary ability in a specific sphere of activity or knowledge

difficult_points: It 是形式主语，真正主语是 to assume 引导的不定式。
those who... 对 gifted children 作同位解释。
must have been 表示对过去情况的肯定推测。

sentences.sentence: But look closer and a different story emerges.
sentences.translation: 但仔细观察后，会发现事实并非如此。
difficult_points: look closer 是祈使句，省略主语 you。
and 后是另一个完整分句，说明进一步观察后的结果。

sentences.sentence: Mirzakhani was born in Tehran, Iran.
sentences.translation: 米尔扎哈尼出生于伊朗德黑兰。
difficult_points: was born 是固定的被动形式，意为‘出生’。
Tehran, Iran 是地点的同位语表达。

sentences.sentence: She went to a highly selective girls' school but maths wasn't her interest - reading was.
sentences.translation: 她就读于一所选拔严格的女子学校，但数学并不是她的兴趣所在——阅读才是。

structure.text: went to a highly selective girls' school

difficult_points: but 连接两个转折分句。
reading was 省略了 her interest，避免重复。

sentences.sentence: She loved novels and would read anything she could lay her hands on.
sentences.translation: 她喜欢小说，凡是能找到的东西都会读。

structure.text: loved novels and would read anything
she could lay her hands on

difficult_points: would read 表示过去反复发生的习惯。
anything 后的定语从句省略了关系代词作 lay...on 的宾语。

sentences.sentence: As for maths, she did rather poorly at it for the first couple of years in her middle school, but became interested when her elder brother told her about what he'd learned.
sentences.translation: 至于数学，她在中学最初几年学得相当差，但哥哥告诉她自己学到的东西后，她产生了兴趣。

structure.text: she did rather poorly at it for the first couple of years in her middle school
when her elder brother told her about what he'd learned

difficult_points: As for maths 是话题转换，it 指 maths。
what he'd learned 是 about 的宾语从句，意为‘他学到的东西’。
when 从句说明她产生兴趣的时间。

sentences.sentence: He shared a famous maths problem from a magazine that fascinated her - and she was hooked.
sentences.translation: 他分享了一本杂志上的著名数学题，这道题令她着迷——她从此便迷上了数学。

structure.text: a famous maths problem from a magazine that fascinated her

difficult_points: that fascin­ated her 修饰 maths problem。
was hooked 是被动形式的习语，表示‘着迷、上瘾’。

sentences.sentence: In adult life it is clear that she was curious, excited by what she did and also resolute in the face of setbacks.
sentences.translation: 成年后可以明显看出，她充满好奇，对所做的事感到兴奋，而且面对挫折也很坚定。

structure.text: that she was curious, excited by what she did and also resolute in the face of setbacks

difficult_points: It is clear 后的 that 从句是真正主语。
excited by... 与 curious、resolute 并列作主语补足语。

sentences.sentence: One of her comments sums it up.
sentences.translation: 她的一句话概括了这一点。
difficult_points: it 指前文对她好奇、兴奋和坚韧的描述。
sum up 是短语动词，意为概括。

sentences.sentence: "Of course, the most rewarding part is the “Aha” moment, the excitement of discovery and enjoyment of understanding something new . . . But most of the time, doing mathematics for me is like being on a long hike with no trail and no end in sight."
sentences.translation: “当然，最有回报的部分是‘啊哈’时刻——发现新事物的兴奋，以及理解新事物的快乐……但对我而言，大多数时候做数学就像进行一场没有道路、也看不到尽头的长途徒步。”

structure.text: the “Aha” moment, the excitement of discovery and enjoyment of understanding something new
is like being on a long hike with no trail and no end in sight

difficult_points: 第一个句子用两个同位名词短语解释最有回报的部分。
doing mathematics 是动名词短语作主语。
with no trail and no end in sight 描述徒步的艰难和未知。

sentences.sentence: That trail took her to the heights of original research into mathematics.
sentences.translation: 那条看不见尽头的道路把她带到了数学原创研究的巅峰。

structure.text: to the heights of original research into mathematics

difficult_points: That trail 是比喻说法，指她长期坚持数学探索的道路。
take someone to 表示‘把某人带到某种成就或境地’。

sentences.sentence: Is her background unusual?
sentences.translation: 她的成长背景很不寻常吗？
difficult_points: 这是一般疑问句，系动词 Is 提到主语前。
unusual 作主语补足语，描述 background。

sentences.sentence: Apparently not.
sentences.translation: 显然并不是。
difficult_points: 这是省略句，完整意思是 her background is apparently not unusual。
Apparently 表示说话者基于证据的判断。

sentences.sentence: Most Nobel prize winners were unexceptional in childhood.
sentences.translation: 大多数诺贝尔奖得主在童年时都很普通。
difficult_points: unexceptional 意为‘平凡的’，并非‘不优秀’的绝对否定。
in childhood 指这些得主的童年时期。

sentences.sentence: Einstein was slow to talk as a baby.
sentences.translation: 爱因斯坦婴儿时期开口说话很晚。
difficult_points: slow to talk 表示‘迟迟不会说话’，to talk 是补足成分。
as a baby 表示时间阶段。

sentences.sentence: He failed the general part of the entry test to Zurich Polytechnic - though they let him in because of high physics and maths scores.
sentences.translation: 他没有通过苏黎世理工学院入学考试的普通部分，不过由于物理和数学成绩很高，学校还是让他入学了。

structure.text: the general part of the entry test to Zurich Polytechnic
though they let him in because of high physics and maths scores
because of high physics and maths scores

difficult_points: though 引导让步从句，说明未通过考试却仍被录取。
let him in 中 him 是宾语，in 是宾语补足语。

sentences.sentence: He struggled at work initially, but he kept plugging away and eventually rewrote the laws of Newtonian mechanics with his theory of relativity.
sentences.translation: 他起初在工作中举步维艰，但一直坚持努力，最终用相对论改写了牛顿力学定律。

structure.text: but he kept plugging away and eventually rewrote the laws of Newtonian mechanics with his theory of relativity
kept plugging away and eventually rewrote

difficult_points: but 后是与前句转折的并列分句。
keep plugging away 是习语，表示持续努力。

sentences.sentence: There has been a considerable amount of research on high performance over the last century that suggests it goes way beyond tested intelligence.
sentences.translation: 过去一个世纪里，关于高水平表现的大量研究表明，它远远超出了经过测试的智力范围。

structure.text: There has been a considerable amount of research on high performance over the last century
that suggests it goes way beyond tested intelligence
it goes way beyond tested intelligence

difficult_points: There has been 是现在完成时的存在句，research 是实际主语。
that 引导的定语从句修饰 research，it 指 high performance。

sentences.sentence: On top of that, research is clear that brains are flexible, new neural pathways can be created, and IQ isn't fixed.
sentences.translation: 此外，研究明确表明，大脑具有可塑性，新的神经通路可以形成，智商也不是固定不变的。

structure.text: that brains are flexible, new neural pathways can be created, and IQ isn't fixed

difficult_points: that 从句中并列了三个研究结论。
can be created 和 isn't fixed 分别是被动语态和系表结构。

sentences.sentence: For example, just because you can read stories with hundreds of pages at the age of five doesn't mean you will still be ahead of your contemporaries in your teens.
sentences.translation: 例如，仅仅因为你五岁时能读几百页的故事，并不意味着十几岁时仍会领先于同龄人。

structure.text: just because you can read stories with hundreds of pages at the age of five
you will still be ahead of your contemporaries in your teens

difficult_points: just because... doesn't mean... 是‘仅仅因为……并不意味着……’结构。
will still be ahead 表示未来某时是否仍然领先。

sentences.sentence: While the jury is out on giftedness being innate and other factors potentially making the difference, what is certain is that the behaviours associated with high levels of performance are replicable and most can be taught - even traits such as curiosity.
sentences.translation: 关于天赋是否与生俱来、其他因素是否可能起决定作用，目前还没有定论；但可以确定的是，与高水平表现相关的行为是可以复制的，而且大多数都能通过教导获得——甚至包括好奇心这样的特质。

structure.text: While the jury is out on giftedness being innate and other factors potentially making the difference
that the behaviours associated with high levels of performance are replicable and most can be taught
associated with high levels of performance

difficult_points: While 从句表示‘尽管目前没有定论’，主句给出确定结论。
what is certain 是主语从句，that 从句作表语。
associated with... 修饰 behaviours。

sentences.sentence: According to my colleague Prof Deborah Eyre, with whom I've collaborated on the book Great Minds and How to Grow Them, the latest neuroscience and psychological research suggests most individuals can reach levels of performance associated in school with the gifted and talented.
sentences.translation: 我的同事黛博拉·艾尔教授与我曾合作撰写《伟大的头脑以及如何培养它们》一书；据她说，最新的神经科学和心理学研究表明，大多数人都能达到学校通常归于资优学生的表现水平。

structure.text: According to my colleague Prof Deborah Eyre
with whom I've collaborated on the book Great Minds and How to Grow Them
the latest neuroscience and psychological research
most individuals can reach levels of performance associated in school with the gifted and talented
associated in school with the gifted and talented

difficult_points: with whom 引导非限制性定语从句，whom 指 Deborah Eyre。
associated in school... 修饰 levels of performance，说明这种水平在学校被视为资优表现。

sentences.sentence: However, they must be taught the right attitudes and approaches to their learning and develop the attributes of high performers - curiosity, persistence and hard work, for example - an approach Eyre calls "high performance learning".
sentences.translation: 不过，他们必须学会对待学习的正确态度和方法，并培养高绩效者的特质——例如好奇心、坚持和勤奋；艾尔把这种方法称为“高绩效学习”。

structure.text: must be taught the right attitudes and approaches to their learning and develop the attributes of high performers
curiosity, persistence and hard work, for example
an approach Eyre calls "high performance learning"

difficult_points: must be taught 与 develop 并列，前者是被动，后者是主动。
破折号中的三个名词是 attributes 的举例。
Eyre calls... 是省略关系代词的定语从句。

sentences.sentence: Critically, they need the right support in developing those approaches at home as well as at school.
sentences.translation: 关键是，他们在家里和学校都需要得到发展这些方法的适当支持。

structure.text: the right support in developing those approaches at home as well as at school

difficult_points: Critically 表示作者强调这是关键条件。
as well as 连接 home 和 school，表示两处都需要支持。

expressions.text: at home as well as at school

sentences.sentence: Prof Anders Ericsson, an eminent education psychologist at Florida State University, US, is the co-author of Peak: Secrets from the New Science of Expertise.
sentences.translation: 安德斯·埃里克松教授是美国佛罗里达州立大学杰出的教育心理学家，也是《巅峰：来自专业技能新科学的秘密》一书的合著者。

structure.text: an eminent education psychologist at Florida State University, US
the co-author of Peak: Secrets from the New Science of Expertise

difficult_points: 逗号中的名词短语是对 Ericsson 的同位说明。
is the co-author 表示身份，而非动作。

sentences.sentence: After research going back to 1980 into diverse achievements, from music to memory to sport, he doesn't think unique and innate talents are at the heart of performance.
sentences.translation: 在自1980年起对音乐、记忆和体育等多种成就进行研究后，他认为独特的先天才能并不是表现出色的核心。

structure.text: After research going back to 1980 into diverse achievements, from music to memory to sport
unique and innate talents are at the heart of performance

difficult_points: After research... 是时间背景，going back to 1980 修饰 research。
think 后的宾语从句使用陈述语序，talents 是从句主语。

sentences.sentence: Deliberate practice, that stretches you every step of the way, and around 10,000 hours of it, is what produces the goods.
sentences.translation: 有目的的练习——这种练习会在每一步都挑战你——以及大约一万小时的练习，才是产生优秀成果的原因。

structure.text: Deliberate practice, that stretches you every step of the way, and around 10,000 hours of it
that stretches you every step of the way

difficult_points: that 引导的定语从句修饰 deliberate practice。
what produces the goods 是表语从句，意为‘真正产生结果的东西’。

sentences.sentence: It's not a magic number - the highest performers move on to doing a whole lot more, of course.
sentences.translation: 这并不是一个神奇的固定数字——当然，表现最突出的人会继续进行多得多的练习。

structure.text: move on to doing a whole lot more

difficult_points: It 指前文提到的一万小时，并非神奇的硬性标准。
move on to 后接动名词 doing，表示继续做更多练习。

sentences.sentence: Ericsson's memory research is particularly interesting because random students, trained in memory techniques for the study, went on to outperform others thought to have innately superior memories - those who you might call gifted.
sentences.translation: 埃里克松关于记忆的研究尤其有趣，因为随机选出的学生接受记忆技巧训练后，超过了那些被认为天生拥有更好记忆力的人——也就是你可能称为天才的人。

structure.text: because random students, trained in memory techniques for the study, went on to outperform others thought to have innately superior memories - those who you might call gifted
trained in memory techniques for the study
thought to have innately superior memories
those who you might call gifted

difficult_points: because 从句说明研究有趣的原因。
trained 和 thought to have 都是过去分词短语，分别修饰 students 和 others。
who you might call gifted 中关系代词作 call 的宾语。

sentences.sentence: But it is perhaps the work of Benjamin Bloom, another distinguished American educationist working in the 1980s, that gives the most pause for thought.
sentences.translation: 但或许正是另一位杰出的美国教育家本杰明·布卢姆在20世纪80年代的研究，最值得我们停下来思考。

structure.text: it is perhaps the work of Benjamin Bloom, another distinguished American educationist working in the 1980s, that gives the most pause for thought
another distinguished American educationist working in the 1980s
that gives the most pause for thought

difficult_points: It is...that... 是强调句，强调 Benjamin Bloom 的研究。
working in the 1980s 修饰 educationist。

sentences.sentence: Bloom's team looked at a group of extraordinarily high achieving people in disciplines as varied as ballet, swimming, piano, tennis, maths, sculpture and neurology.
sentences.translation: 布卢姆的团队研究了一群成就极高的人，他们分布在芭蕾、游泳、钢琴、网球、数学、雕塑和神经学等各不相同的领域。

structure.text: a group of extraordinarily high achieving people in disciplines as varied as ballet, swimming, piano, tennis, maths, sculpture and neurology
as varied as ballet, swimming, piano, tennis, maths, sculpture and neurology

difficult_points: as varied as... 表示领域种类非常多样。
high achieving 是复合形容词，修饰 people。

sentences.sentence: He found a pattern of parents encouraging and supporting their children, often in areas they enjoyed themselves.
sentences.translation: 他发现了一个共同模式：父母鼓励并支持孩子，而且往往是在父母自己也喜欢的领域。

structure.text: a pattern of parents encouraging and supporting their children
often in areas they enjoyed themselves

difficult_points: parents encouraging and supporting 是动名词复合结构，说明 pattern 的内容。
they enjoyed themselves 修饰 areas，they 指 parents。

sentences.sentence: Bloom's outstanding people had worked very hard and consistently at something they had become hooked on when at a young age, and their parents all emerged as having strong work ethics themselves.
sentences.translation: 布卢姆研究的杰出人物从小就迷上了某件事，并为此长期勤奋而持续地努力；结果显示，他们的父母自己也都具有很强的职业道德。

structure.text: had worked very hard and consistently at something
they had become hooked on when at a young age
and their parents all emerged as having strong work ethics themselves
as having strong work ethics themselves

difficult_points: they had become hooked on 中 on 的宾语是前面的 something。
had worked 和 had become 都用过去完成时，表示早于研究结论的经历。
emerge as 表示‘最终显现为……’。

sentences.sentence: Eyre says we know how high performers learn.
sentences.translation: 艾尔说，我们知道高绩效者是如何学习的。

structure.text: we know how high performers learn

difficult_points: says 后省略 that，接宾语从句。
how 引导的从句说明学习的方式。

sentences.sentence: From that she has developed a high performing learning approach.
sentences.translation: 基于这一点，她发展出了一套高绩效学习方法。
difficult_points: From that 指根据前一句关于高绩效者学习方式的认识。
现在完成时 has developed 表示方法已形成并延续到现在。

sentences.sentence: She is working on this with a group of schools, both in Britain and abroad.
sentences.translation: 她正在与英国及海外的一些学校合作推进这项工作。
difficult_points: this 指前面提出的高绩效学习方法。
both...and... 并列两个地点范围。

sentences.sentence: Some spin-off research, which looked in detail at 24 of the 3,000 children being studied who were succeeding despite difficult circumstances, found something remarkable.
sentences.translation: 一项衍生研究对正在接受研究的3000名儿童中的24名进行了详细考察；这些儿童尽管处境困难却取得了成功，研究发现了一个非凡现象。

structure.text: which looked in detail at 24 of the 3,000 children being studied who were succeeding despite difficult circumstances
who were succeeding despite difficult circumstances

difficult_points: which 修饰 spin-off research，说明研究考察了什么。
being studied 修饰 children；who were succeeding 进一步修饰其中的 children。
despite 引出让步短语，说明成功与困难并存。

sentences.sentence: Half were getting free school meals because of poverty, more than half were living with a single parent, and four in five were living in disadvantaged areas.
sentences.translation: 其中一半因为贫困而领取免费校餐，超过一半与单亲家长一起生活，五分之四生活在处境不利的地区。

structure.text: Half were getting free school meals because of poverty
more than half were living with a single parent
four in five were living in disadvantaged areas

difficult_points: 三个并列分句分别提供儿童家庭和社区背景。
four in five 是分数表达，意为五人中有四人。

sentences.sentence: Interviews uncovered strong evidence of an adult or adults in the child's life who valued and supported education, either in the immediate or extended family or in the child's wider community.
sentences.translation: 访谈发现了有力证据，表明这些孩子的生活中有一位或多位重视并支持教育的成年人；他们可能来自直系或大家庭，也可能来自孩子所在的更广泛社区。

structure.text: strong evidence of an adult or adults in the child's life who valued and supported education
either in the immediate or extended family or in the child's wider community

difficult_points: who 修饰 an adult or adults，说明这些成年人的共同特点。
either...or... 列出成年人的可能来源。

sentences.sentence: Children talked about the need to work hard at school, to listen in class and keep trying.
sentences.translation: 孩子们谈到了在学校努力学习、课堂上认真听讲并坚持尝试的必要性。

structure.text: the need to work hard at school, to listen in class and keep trying
to work hard at school, to listen in class and keep trying

difficult_points: 三个不定式并列说明 need 的具体内容。
keep trying 中 keep 后接动名词，表示持续努力。

sentences.sentence: Let us end with Einstein, the epitome of a genius.
sentences.translation: 让我们以天才典范爱因斯坦作为结尾。
difficult_points: Let us end with... 是结束全文的祈使表达。
the epitome of a genius 是 Einstein 的同位语，意为天才的典范。

sentences.sentence: He clearly had curiosity, character and determination.
sentences.translation: 他显然具有好奇心、品格和决心。
difficult_points: clearly 是副词，表达作者对判断的确信。
三个抽象名词并列作 had 的宾语。

sentences.sentence: He struggled against rejection in early life but was undeterred.
sentences.translation: 他早年曾努力应对遭到拒绝的处境，但始终没有被吓倒。

structure.text: He struggled against rejection in early life

difficult_points: but 连接转折并列句，was 后省略主语 he。
undeterred 表示‘未被阻止或吓倒的’。

sentences.sentence: Did he think he was a genius or even gifted?
sentences.translation: 他认为自己是天才，甚至是有天赋的人吗？

structure.text: he was a genius or even gifted

difficult_points: Did 引导一般过去时疑问句，think 后接宾语从句。
gifted 后省略了 a genius，避免重复。

sentences.sentence: He once wrote: "It's not that I'm so smart, it's just that I stay with problems longer.
sentences.translation: 他曾写道：“并不是我特别聪明，只是我在问题上坚持得更久。”

structure.text: It's not that I'm so smart
it's just that I stay with problems longer

difficult_points: It's not that... it's just that... 用于否定一种解释并提出真正原因。
stay with problems longer 表示在难题上坚持更久。

sentences.sentence: Most people say it is the intellect which makes a great scientist.
sentences.translation: 大多数人说，是智力造就了伟大的科学家。

structure.text: it is the intellect which makes a great scientist

difficult_points: it is the intellect which... 是强调句，强调 intellect。
which 引导的定语从句说明智力产生的作用。

sentences.sentence: They are wrong: it is character."
sentences.translation: 他们错了：真正起作用的是品格。
difficult_points: 冒号后是省略式强调句，it 指真正造就科学家的因素。
character 与前句 intellect 对比，构成作者的结论。
